title: 24:44 ГўВҖВ” December 12, 2024
body_text:
24:44 ГўВҖВ” December 12, 2024
Update to Routing Instructions ГўВҖВ“ Mexican Peso (MXN) Incoming Wires, Form 3775
We updated CitibankГўВҖВҷs MXN correspondent bank instructions.
Document Library
Status
Routing Instructions ГўВҖВ“ Mexican Peso (MXN) Incoming Wires
3775
We updated instructions for the sending financial institution if unable to determine CitibankГўВҖВҷs MXN correspondent bank.
We changed it from ГўВҖВңBanco Nacional de Mexico S.A. (BNMXMXMMCVT)ГўВҖВқ to ГўВҖВңBanco Citi Mexico (CITIMXMMCVT)ГўВҖВқ.
Revised
